name: Baked Stuffed Red Snapper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté the minced celery over low heat until tender.
2. Add the chopped tomatoes, Tabasco sauce, parsley, thyme, salt, sage, and bread that has been soaked in cold water and then squeezed dry. Mix everything together in the skillet.
3. Stuff the mixture into the cavity of the red snapper.
4. Skewer any openings closed with toothpicks.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Place the fish on a greased sheet of paper or under a white cloth to make it easier to transfer later.
7. In a bowl, combine butter, lemon juice, salt, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco sauce. Gradually add salad oil until well blended.
8. Pour the sauce over the fish.
9. Bake for about 10 minutes per pound of fish, basting often with the sauce.
10. Serve when done.
